Mistral.headline: No headline release. Le Chat Work Mode + Medium 3.5 current. EU banking cybersecurity model in development.

Perplexity.headline: Perplexity Computer now available as Microsoft Teams app. Space skills for team task packages GA. Kimi K2.5 (Moonshot AI/Chinese-origin) on US inference — Week 5, no resolution.
Perplexity.alertReason: Kimi K2.5 (Moonshot AI/Chinese-origin model) remains on Perplexity US inference stack — Week 5 with no resolution. Restrict in enterprise admin settings for sensitive research.

Microsoft 365 Copilot.headline: GPT-5.5 Instant + Claude Opus 4.7 in M365 Copilot. Claude default-on for eligible tenants ongoing. SharePoint Copilot redesign rolling out.
Microsoft 365 Copilot.alertReason: Claude models default-on in M365 eligible tenants — subprocessor data pathway DPA review still outstanding (Week 2).

GitHub Copilot.headline: v1.0.53 (May 24) multiline fix. T-7 days to usage-based AI Credits billing June 1. Copilot code review also consumes Actions minutes June 1. Business/Enterprise get bonus credits June–Sept.
GitHub Copilot.alertReason: Usage-based billing June 1 — T-7 days. Code review also consumes Actions minutes starting June 1. Enterprise cost projections critically overdue.

Cursor.headline: No new release since Cursor 2.5 / Composer 2.5 (May 18). Cloud dev environments + Teams integration current.

Gamma.headline: No standalone release. Available as Grok connector (May 22) for presentation creation via Grok agentic workflows. Notion/Gamma integration teased on LinkedIn (unconfirmed).

Notion AI.headline: No new AI feature today. Workers platform GA. Workers billing switches to Notion Credits August 11. MCP meeting notes + block comments active.
